name: Winchester Rural West

locations.name: Winchester District
locations.description: The Police Office is situated within the Fire Station on Pound Hill in Alresford. The Office is not open to the public.
locations.address:
Alresford Neighbourhood Police Office,
Pound Hill,
Alresford

description: Winchester Rural West includes the following Parishes; Compton and Shawford, Otterbourne, Hursley, Sparsholt, Crawley and Headbourne Worthy.
